readings.Aries: The wound you keep reopening has something to teach. You've been treating the symptom. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Taurus: The loyalty you extend to others is real. It occasionally extends past the point of useful. This situation responds well to direct engagement.
readings.Gemini: You've been performing interest in something that no longer interests you. Stop. One conversation today matters more than the rest combined.
readings.Cancer: The people who love you most often feel helpless around you because you're always already fine. There's more support available than you've asked for.
readings.Leo: There is love in your life that is asking to be expressed more plainly. Try plain. The window for this is shorter than it looks.
readings.Virgo: The system you've built is working. You are allowed to stop improving it for one day. Say the thing you've been rehearsing.
readings.Libra: You've been mediating a situation that doesn't require a mediator — it requires a participant. The question matters more than the answer right now.
readings.Scorpio: The thing you've been orbiting without naming — name it today, even if only to yourself. Trust the slow version of this over the fast one.
readings.Sagittarius: The philosophical framework you apply to your own life — apply it with the same generosity to someone else's today. The connection you almost didn't make is the one that matters.
readings.Capricorn: Your integrity is one of your most defining qualities. It is also occasionally weaponised against yourself. The window for this is shorter than it looks.
readings.Aquarius: Something you've classified as not your problem has been your problem the entire time. Trust the slow version of this over the fast one.
readings.Pisces: The boundary between you and other people is more permeable than average. This is your gift and your difficulty. The first instinct was right.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You're both good at starting things. One of you will have to become better at finishing them.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: Something about this combination feels irresistible to both of you. That irresistibility is worth examining.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
